setpoint_narrative: Increase replay pass rate for a repeated mail-triage workflow without increasing memory pollution.
acceptance: Candidate skill passes L0 static checks.
Candidate skill improves replay score over baseline on at least 3 historical tasks.
No redaction or persistent-memory guardrail fails.
sampling_plan: Evaluate replay cases from the last 30 days of redacted task evidence.
recovery_target: Disable the candidate and restore the previous skill version within 5 minutes.
rollback_trigger: Replay win rate below threshold, redaction failure, or public-channel safety incident.
constraints: Do not change live channel session mechanics.
Do not write persistent memory from a single task.
coupling_notes: The skill may affect future tool selection for mail tasks only.
approximation_validity: Replay proves behavior on known tasks only; canary is still required before broad activation.
